compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect template integration in onboarding
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update project documentation to reflect the new template integration capability in onboarding.

### Implementation
- Update CLAUDE.md quick reference and architecture section with:
  - Template registry config file location (plugins/dso/config/template-registry.yaml)
  - Template selection gate in onboarding flow (Phase 1.5)
  - Install paths (Phase 1.6a nava-platform, Phase 1.6b git clone)
  - Post-install re-detection (Phase 1.7)
- Update any existing docs referencing onboarding behavior

### TDD Exemption
test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — documentation files

### File Impact
- MODIFY: CLAUDE.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions template registry
  Verify: grep -q "template-registry\|template registry" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions template selection in onboarding
  Verify: grep -qi "template.*onboarding\|onboarding.*template" CLAUDE.md
